name: Alert Region
description: Displays important messages and warnings to users.

name: Breadcrumb
description: Provides a trail of links to indicate the user's location within the application.

name: Button
description: Interactive element to trigger actions like submit or cancel.

name: Interactive Grid
description: A rich, editable data table component with sorting, filtering, and pagination.

name: Data Reporter
description: Allows generating, exporting, and scheduling data reports.

name: AI Interactive Report
description: Uses AI to generate insights, recommendations, and summaries over data grids.
